name: IGOR_01_Inbound_AfterHours
description: IGOR_01: roteador inbound after-hours. 12 condições determinísticas em ordem + Redis lock+batching (INCR+EXPIRE 30 NX-EX substitute + RPUSH/LRANGE/DEL) + calls IGOR_02 (mídia)/IGOR_04 (labels). IGOR_03/IGOR_12 placeholders. Errors → IGOR_07.

parameters.jsCode: const items=$input.all();return items.map(item=>{const root=item.json||{};const b=root.body||root;const data=b.data||{};const key=data.key||{};const message=data.message||{};const additional=b.additional_attributes||{};const msgId=key.id?String(key.id):'';const remoteJid=key.remoteJid?String(key.remoteJid):'';const rawPhone=remoteJid.split('@')[0]||'';const fromMe=key.fromMe===true;let messageType=data.messageType||'';if(messageType==='conversation'||messageType==='extendedTextMessage')messageType='text';else if(messageType==='audioMessage'||messageType==='pttMessage')messageType='audio';else if(messageType==='imageMessage')messageType='image';else if(messageType==='documentMessage'||messageType==='documentWithCaptionMessage')messageType='document';else if(messageType==='videoMessage')messageType='video';else if(!messageType)messageType='unknown';let text='';let caption='';let mediaUrl='';let mediaBase64='';let mimeType='';if(message.conversation)text=String(message.conversation);else if(message.extendedTextMessage&&message.extendedTextMessage.text)text=String(message.extendedTextMessage.text);if(message.audioMessage){mimeType=String(message.audioMessage.mimetype||'audio/ogg');mediaUrl=String(message.audioMessage.url||'');}else if(message.imageMessage){mimeType=String(message.imageMessage.mimetype||'image/jpeg');mediaUrl=String(message.imageMessage.url||'');caption=String(message.imageMessage.caption||'');}else if(message.documentMessage){mimeType=String(message.documentMessage.mimetype||'application/pdf');mediaUrl=String(message.documentMessage.url||'');caption=String(message.documentMessage.caption||message.documentMessage.title||'');}if(data.mediaBase64)mediaBase64=String(data.mediaBase64);else if(data.media_base64)mediaBase64=String(data.media_base64);const tsRaw=data.messageTimestamp;let timestamp;if(typeof tsRaw==='number')timestamp=new Date(tsRaw*1000).toISOString();else if(typeof tsRaw==='string'&&/^\d+$/.test(tsRaw))timestamp=new Date(Number(tsRaw)*1000).toISOString();else timestamp=new Date().toISOString();const conversationId=(b.chatwoot_conversation_id!==undefined&&b.chatwoot_conversation_id!==null)?String(b.chatwoot_conversation_id):'';const contactId=(b.chatwoot_contact_id!==undefined&&b.chatwoot_contact_id!==null)?String(b.chatwoot_contact_id):'';const instance=String(b.instance||'');const pushName=String((data.pushName)||'');const testRunId=additional.test_run_id||(b.test_run_id)||null;return{json:{raw_phone:rawPhone,msg_id:msgId,from_me:fromMe,message_type:messageType,text:text,caption:caption,media_url:mediaUrl,media_base64:mediaBase64,mime_type:mimeType,chatwoot_conversation_id:conversationId,chatwoot_contact_id:contactId,instance:instance,push_name:pushName,timestamp:timestamp,test_run_id:testRunId,raw_payload_json:JSON.stringify(b)}};});

parameters.query: INSERT INTO public.events (event_type, phone, chatwoot_conversation_id, workflow_name, payload) VALUES ('inbound_received', NULLIF($1::text, ''), NULLIF($2::text, '')::int, 'IGOR_01_Inbound_AfterHours', $3::jsonb);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ (function(){ const m = $('Normalize Payload').first().json; return [m.raw_phone, m.chatwoot_conversation_id, JSON.stringify({ msg_id: m.msg_id, message_type: m.message_type, from_me: m.from_me, test_run_id: m.test_run_id })]; })() }}

parameters.query: SELECT (SELECT value::text FROM public.settings WHERE key='ai_enabled_global') AS ai_enabled_global, (SELECT value::text FROM public.settings WHERE key='workflows_enabled') AS workflows_enabled, (SELECT value::text FROM public.settings WHERE key='holidays') AS holidays, (SELECT value::text FROM public.settings WHERE key='holiday_policy') AS holiday_policy, (SELECT value::text FROM public.settings WHERE key='after_hours_start') AS after_hours_start, (SELECT value::text FROM public.settings WHERE key='after_hours_end') AS after_hours_end, (SELECT value::text FROM public.settings WHERE key='timezone') AS timezone;

conditions.leftValue: ={{ (function(){ try { return JSON.parse(($('Read Settings').first().json.ai_enabled_global || 'true')) === false; } catch(e) { return ($('Read Settings').first().json.ai_enabled_global || 'true').toString().toLowerCase() === 'false'; } })() }}

conditions.leftValue: ={{ (function(){ try { const we = JSON.parse(($('Read Settings').first().json.workflows_enabled || '{}')); return we && we.IGOR_01 === false; } catch(e) { return false; } })() }}

parameters.jsCode: const m=$('Normalize Payload').first().json;const raw=String(m.raw_phone||'');let digits=raw.replace(/\D/g,'');if(digits.length===13&&digits.startsWith('55')){const ddd=digits.substring(2,4);const rest=digits.substring(4);if(/^[1-9][0-9]$/.test(ddd)&&/^9\d{8}$/.test(rest)){return[{json:{phone:digits,phone_valid:true,raw_phone:raw}}];}}if(digits.length===12&&digits.startsWith('55')){const ddd=digits.substring(2,4);const rest=digits.substring(4);if(/^[1-9][0-9]$/.test(ddd)&&/^\d{8}$/.test(rest)){const normalized='55'+ddd+'9'+rest;return[{json:{phone:normalized,phone_valid:true,raw_phone:raw}}];}}return[{json:{phone:'',phone_valid:false,raw_phone:raw,reason:'invalid_format'}}];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO public.events (event_type, phone, chatwoot_conversation_id, workflow_name, payload) VALUES ('invalid_phone', NULLIF($1::text, ''), NULLIF($2::text, '')::int, 'IGOR_01_Inbound_AfterHours', $3::jsonb);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ (function(){ const m = $('Normalize Payload').first().json; const p = $('Normalize Phone').first().json; return [p.raw_phone, m.chatwoot_conversation_id, JSON.stringify({ raw_phone: p.raw_phone, reason: p.reason || 'invalid_phone', msg_id: m.msg_id, test_run_id: m.test_run_id })]; })() }}

parameters.query: SELECT c.id::text AS contact_id, c.phone, c.do_not_contact, c.consent_marketing, c.optout_at::text AS optout_at FROM public.contacts c WHERE c.phone = $1::text LIMIT 1;

conditions.leftValue: ={{ (function(){ const all = $('Lookup Contact').all(); if (!all || all.length === 0) return false; const c = all[0].json || {}; return c.do_not_contact === true; })() }}

parameters.query: SELECT cv.id::text AS conv_id, cv.state, cv.ai_enabled, cv.human_locked FROM public.conversations cv WHERE cv.chatwoot_conversation_id = NULLIF($1::text, '')::int LIMIT 1;

conditions.leftValue: ={{ (function(){ const all = $('Lookup Conversation').all(); if (!all || all.length === 0) return false; const cv = all[0].json || {}; if (!cv || cv.conv_id === undefined) return false; return cv.human_locked === true; })() }}

={{ (function(){ const all = $('Lookup Conversation').all(); if (!all || all.length === 0) return false; const cv = all[0].json || {}; if (!cv || cv.conv_id === undefined) return false; return cv.ai_enabled === false; })() }}

parameters.query: SELECT cc.id::text AS campaign_contact_id, cc.campaign_id::text AS campaign_id, cc.status FROM public.campaign_contacts cc JOIN public.contacts c ON c.id = cc.contact_id WHERE c.phone = $1::text AND cc.status IN ('sent','delivered','replied','interested') ORDER BY cc.updated_at DESC LIMIT 1;

conditions.leftValue: ={{ (function(){ const all = $('Lookup Campaign Contacts').all(); if (!all || all.length === 0) return false; const c = all[0].json || {}; return !!c.campaign_contact_id; })() }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO public.events (event_type, phone, chatwoot_conversation_id, campaign_id, campaign_contact_id, workflow_name, payload) VALUES ('campaign_routed_pending_IGOR_12', NULLIF($1::text, ''), NULLIF($2::text, '')::int, NULLIF($3::text, '')::uuid, NULLIF($4::text, '')::uuid, 'IGOR_01_Inbound_AfterHours', $5::jsonb);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ (function(){ const m = $('Normalize Payload').first().json; const p = $('Normalize Phone').first().json; const all = $('Lookup Campaign Contacts').all(); const cc = (all && all[0] && all[0].json) || {}; return [p.phone, m.chatwoot_conversation_id, cc.campaign_id || '', cc.campaign_contact_id || '', JSON.stringify({ reason: 'IGOR_12_not_yet_implemented', campaign_contact_status: cc.status || null, msg_id: m.msg_id, message_type: m.message_type, test_run_id: m.test_run_id })]; })() }}

parameters.jsCode: const s=$('Read Settings').first().json||{};function pjs(raw,fb){if(raw===undefined||raw===null||raw==='')return fb;try{return JSON.parse(raw);}catch(e){return fb;}}const ahStart=pjs(s.after_hours_start,'19:00');const ahEnd=pjs(s.after_hours_end,'08:00');const tz=pjs(s.timezone,'America/Sao_Paulo');const holidaysList=pjs(s.holidays,[]);const holidayPolicy=pjs(s.holiday_policy,'after_hours_force');const now=new Date();let hh='00';let mm='00';let ymd=now.toISOString().slice(0,10);try{const fmt=new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-CA',{timeZone:tz,year:'numeric',month:'2-digit',day:'2-digit',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',hour12:false});const parts=fmt.formatToParts(now).reduce(function(acc,p){acc[p.type]=p.value;return acc;},{});ymd=(parts.year||'0000')+'-'+(parts.month||'01')+'-'+(parts.day||'01');hh=parts.hour||'00';mm=parts.minute||'00';if(hh==='24')hh='00';}catch(e){}const curHm=hh+':'+mm;function hmToMin(s){const parts=String(s||'').split(':');const h=Number(parts[0]||0);const m=Number(parts[1]||0);return h*60+m;}const curMin=hmToMin(curHm);const startMin=hmToMin(ahStart);const endMin=hmToMin(ahEnd);let insideBusinessHours;if(endMin<startMin){insideBusinessHours=(curMin>=endMin&&curMin<startMin);}else{insideBusinessHours=(curMin>=endMin||curMin<startMin);}const isHoliday=Array.isArray(holidaysList)&&holidaysList.indexOf(ymd)!==-1;let effectiveInsideBusinessHours=insideBusinessHours;if(isHoliday&&holidayPolicy==='after_hours_force'){effectiveInsideBusinessHours=false;}return[{json:{current_hm:curHm,current_ymd:ymd,timezone:tz,inside_business_hours:effectiveInsideBusinessHours,is_holiday:isHoliday,holiday_policy:holidayPolicy}}];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO public.events (event_type, phone, chatwoot_conversation_id, workflow_name, payload) VALUES ('inbound_blocked', NULLIF($1::text, ''), NULLIF($2::text, '')::int, 'IGOR_01_Inbound_AfterHours', $3::jsonb);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ (function(){ const m = $('Normalize Payload').first().json; return [m.raw_phone, m.chatwoot_conversation_id, JSON.stringify({ reason: 'inside_hours', msg_id: m.msg_id, test_run_id: m.test_run_id })]; })() }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO public.events (event_type, phone, chatwoot_conversation_id, workflow_name, payload) VALUES ('holiday_policy_applied', NULLIF($1::text, ''), NULLIF($2::text, '')::int, 'IGOR_01_Inbound_AfterHours', $3::jsonb);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ (function(){ const m = $('Normalize Payload').first().json; const h = $('Check Business Hours + Holiday').first().json; if (!h.is_holiday) return [m.raw_phone || null, m.chatwoot_conversation_id || null, JSON.stringify({ skip: true })]; return [m.raw_phone, m.chatwoot_conversation_id, JSON.stringify({ is_holiday: true, ymd: h.current_ymd, holiday_policy: h.holiday_policy, msg_id: m.msg_id, test_run_id: m.test_run_id })]; })() }}

parameters.jsCode: const phone=$('Normalize Phone').first().json.phone;const key='igor:lock:inbound:'+phone;const items=$input.all();const obj=(items[0]&&items[0].json)||{};let counter=obj[key];if(counter===undefined){for(const k of Object.keys(obj)){if(k.indexOf('igor:lock:inbound:')===0){counter=obj[k];break;}}}const counterNum=Number(counter);const gotLock=counterNum===1;return[{json:{phone:phone,lock_key:key,counter:isNaN(counterNum)?null:counterNum,got_lock:gotLock}}];

const m=$('Normalize Payload').first().json;const items=$input.all();const lrangeOut=(items[0]&&items[0].json)||{};let frags=lrangeOut.batch_fragments;if(typeof frags==='string'){try{frags=JSON.parse(frags);}catch(e){frags=[frags];}}if(!Array.isArray(frags))frags=[];const parsed=[];for(const f of frags){if(typeof f==='string'){try{parsed.push(JSON.parse(f));}catch(e){parsed.push({text:f});}}else if(f&&typeof f==='object'){parsed.push(f);}}const allTexts=[];for(const f of parsed){const t=(f.text||f.caption||'').trim();if(t)allTexts.push(t);}const currentText=(m.text||m.caption||'').trim();if(currentText)allTexts.push(currentText);const merged=allTexts.join('\n').trim();return[{json:{fragments_count:parsed.length+(currentText?1:0),merged_text:merged,prior_fragments:parsed}}];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO public.events (event_type, phone, chatwoot_conversation_id, workflow_name, payload) VALUES ('inbound_batched', NULLIF($1::text, ''), NULLIF($2::text, '')::int, 'IGOR_01_Inbound_AfterHours', $3::jsonb);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ (function(){ const m = $('Normalize Payload').first().json; const p = $('Normalize Phone').first().json; const l = $('Eval Lock Result').first().json; return [p.phone, m.chatwoot_conversation_id, JSON.stringify({ reason: 'lock_held', counter: l.counter, msg_id: m.msg_id, test_run_id: m.test_run_id })]; })() }}

parameters.jsCode: const m=$('Normalize Payload').first().json;const p=$('Normalize Phone').first().json;const mf=$('Merge Fragments').first().json;let normalizedText=mf.merged_text||m.text||'';let safetyFlags={clinical:false,sensitive_image:false,payment_proof:false,financial:false};let shouldHandoff=false;let handoffReason=null;try{if(m.message_type&&m.message_type!=='text'){const media=$('CALL IGOR_02 Media Normalizer').first().json||{};if(media.normalized_text){const mediaText=String(media.normalized_text);normalizedText=normalizedText?(normalizedText+'\n'+mediaText):mediaText;}if(media.safety_flags&&typeof media.safety_flags==='object')safetyFlags=media.safety_flags;if(media.should_handoff===true)shouldHandoff=true;if(media.handoff_reason)handoffReason=media.handoff_reason;}}catch(e){}return[{json:{phone:p.phone,msg_id:m.msg_id,message_type:m.message_type,chatwoot_conversation_id:m.chatwoot_conversation_id,chatwoot_contact_id:m.chatwoot_contact_id,instance:m.instance,push_name:m.push_name,timestamp:m.timestamp,normalized_text:normalizedText,fragments_count:mf.fragments_count||1,safety_flags:safetyFlags,should_handoff:shouldHandoff,handoff_reason:handoffReason,test_run_id:m.test_run_id}}];

parameters.query: WITH up_contact AS (INSERT INTO public.contacts (phone, name) VALUES ($1::text, NULLIF($2::text, '')) ON CONFLICT (phone) DO UPDATE SET name = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.name, ''), public.contacts.name), updated_at = now() RETURNING id) INSERT INTO public.conversations (contact_id, chatwoot_conversation_id, chatwoot_inbox_id, state, ai_enabled, current_flow, last_message_at) SELECT uc.id, NULLIF($3::text, '')::int, COALESCE(NULLIF($4::text, '')::int, 1), 'ai_after_hours', true, 'after_hours', COALESCE(NULLIF($5::text, '')::timestamptz, now()) FROM up_contact uc ON CONFLICT (chatwoot_conversation_id) DO UPDATE SET state = 'ai_after_hours', ai_enabled = CASE WHEN public.conversations.ai_enabled IS NULL THEN true ELSE public.conversations.ai_enabled END, current_flow = 'after_hours', last_message_at = EXCLUDED.last_message_at, updated_at = now() RETURNING id::text AS conversation_uuid, chatwoot_conversation_id, state, ai_enabled;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ (function(){ const m = $('Build Normalized Output').first().json; return [m.phone, m.push_name || '', m.chatwoot_conversation_id, '1', m.timestamp]; })() }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO public.messages (conversation_id, msg_id, text, normalized_text, message_type, direction, role, from_me, media_url, media_mime_type, safety_flags, created_at) SELECT c.id, NULLIF($1::text, ''), NULLIF($2::text, ''), NULLIF($3::text, ''), COALESCE(NULLIF($4::text, ''), 'text'), 'inbound', 'user', false, NULLIF($5::text, ''), NULLIF($6::text, ''), COALESCE(NULLIF($7::text, '')::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb), COALESCE(NULLIF($8::text, '')::timestamptz, now()) FROM public.conversations c WHERE c.chatwoot_conversation_id = NULLIF($9::text, '')::int;

options.queryReplacement: ={{ (function(){ const o = $('Build Normalized Output').first().json; const m = $('Normalize Payload').first().json; return [o.msg_id, m.text || '', o.normalized_text, o.message_type, m.media_url || '', m.mime_type || '', JSON.stringify(o.safety_flags || {}), o.timestamp, o.chatwoot_conversation_id]; })() }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO public.events (event_type, phone, chatwoot_conversation_id, workflow_name, payload) VALUES ('inbound_routed_pending_IGOR_03', NULLIF($1::text, ''), NULLIF($2::text, '')::int, 'IGOR_01_Inbound_AfterHours', $3::jsonb);

options.queryReplacement: ={{ (function(){ const o = $('Build Normalized Output').first().json; return [o.phone, o.chatwoot_conversation_id, JSON.stringify({ msg_id: o.msg_id, message_type: o.message_type, fragments_count: o.fragments_count, normalized_text_preview: (o.normalized_text || '').slice(0, 240), should_handoff: o.should_handoff, handoff_reason: o.handoff_reason, safety_flags: o.safety_flags, chatwoot_contact_id: o.chatwoot_contact_id, push_name: o.push_name, instance: o.instance, reason: 'IGOR_03_not_yet_implemented_wave_4_placeholder', test_run_id: o.test_run_id })]; })() }}

assignments.name: downstream_calls
assignments.value: ={{ (function(){ const o = $('Build Normalized Output').first().json; const calls = []; if (o.message_type && o.message_type !== 'text') calls.push('IGOR_02'); calls.push('IGOR_04:fora_expediente'); calls.push('IGOR_03:placeholder'); return calls; })() }}
